quote.msg:
係咪係西岸？，如果係美國讀完math degree 想留低教書難唔難？

replies.msg:
應該唔難，唔多人爭食，因為數理科老師嚴重短缺，不過你英文千其唔好重香港口音。我自己都係讀完Chem之後搵公立學校嘅工
要注意嘅係未必每個校區都請外藉人士，因為佢哋要俾 working visa 嘅申請費用而且仲幾貴。我自己算好彩，金融海嘯前畢業兼搵到工，我個校區唔再幫外藉人士搞工作簽證同移民。

所以你係搵工嘅話記住記住問兩大問題：
1、會唔會幫你申請工作簽證
2、會唔會幫你搞埋工作移民

我個校區用到我盡先幫我搞移民，由工作第一日到攞到綠卡總共有九年（其中有一年咁咁L好彩俾美國政府抽我個 case 去 audit）

replies.msg:
我聽你咁講，我就咁回應:
如果你想做嘢順便移民嘅話，教初、高中嘅機會會大過CC 好多，因為 CC 本身流失率唔高，所以搵工方面亦會比較難。同埋佢哋應該唔會就咁請個 Fresh undergrad。
至於點解我學校唔早啲幫我搞綠卡，因為學校本身人工又唔係話好高，當我攞到綠卡之後就好大機會會離職，而我亦攞完綠卡後一年就離開咗。所以在於佢哋嘅立場嚟講，會盡量拖。相反，我中同讀完博士之後做 Microsoft，同佢申請工作簽證之餘仲即刻幫佢申請埋綠卡。佢依家亦離開咗 Microsoft 去咗 Bay Area 做另外一間公司度做。

所以我個人認為啦，做 CC嘅話，你嘅 Bargaining power 未必夠其他本地人高，所以會有一定嘅阻力。

我建議你花多啲精力去改香港 Accent，如果唔係嘅話對你教書會有好大影響。我有個前同事，佢台灣人嚟，但係 Accent 超重，俾啲學生玩死。佢教咗一年之後就無繼續教lu...

我聽你咁講，我就咁回應:
如果你想做嘢順便移民嘅話，教初、高中嘅機會會大過CC 好多，因為 CC 本身流失率唔高，所以搵工方面亦會比較難。同埋佢哋應該唔會就咁請個 Fresh undergrad。
至於點解我學校唔早啲幫我搞綠卡，因為學校本身人工又唔係話好高，當我攞到綠卡之後就好大機會會離職，而我亦攞完綠卡後一年就離開咗。所以在於佢哋嘅立場嚟講，會盡量拖。相反，我中同讀完博士之後做 Microsoft，同佢申請工作簽證之餘仲即刻幫佢申請埋綠卡。佢依家亦離開咗 Microsoft 去咗 Bay Area 做另外一間公司度做。

所以我個人認為啦，做 CC嘅話，你嘅 Bargaining power 未必夠其他本地人高，所以會有一定嘅阻力。

我建議你花多啲精力去改香港 Accent，如果唔係嘅話對你教書會有好大影響。我有個前同事，佢台灣人嚟，但係 Accent 超重，俾啲學生玩死。佢教咗一年之後就無繼續教lu...

你個個案有啲特別，因為如果你報 Transfer 嘅話，學校應該知道你係 International Student 同要攞 I-20.
首先你即刻問學校補番張 I-20 先
第二，你依家喺香港定喺美國？如果喺美國就問題唔大，如果你喺香港嘅話，咁你係應該要去領事館重新申請個 Student Visa，因為你已經轉咗學校。其實美國移民局未必會知道你 overstay，最緊要係你依家（或盡快）有張有效嘅 I-20，應該就無問題。同埋，發 I-20理應係學校責任，如果喺嗰半年內你係 Full Time Student 嘅話，咁問題唔會好大。總之佢唔問，你唔使自爆，佢問起就誠實作答，美國政府最唔鍾意人講大話。

讀 nursing 應該比較易攞綠卡，因為護士人手長期短缺，加上醫院係非牟利團體，唔使跟 quota。實際情況最好早啲 email 去問吓醫院嘅 HR，唔好自己估下估下。仲有，提醒你，畢業之前半年要申請 OPT。過程需時，唔好放自己喺一個危險嘅處境。
我美國Visa 2020 7月到期, 穩陣起件係咪12月番黎續會好D? 唔好等到6月先番黎整.

replies.msg:
你預計幾時 transfer 先？我覺得12月或6月都無乜大問題
小問題就係12月你幾時番到嚟，你可以留香港幾耐？因為12月多假，如果有咩閃失就可能會失預算。第二就係最好就係用 transfer 間學校嘅新 I-20 去 renew 簽證，咁就唔使第時番香港或出境時再申請多一次。

我啱啱都睇咗 UC transfer requirements
其實你讀 full time 嘅話，而每個學期讀 15 semester credits，你兩年就可以 transfer。唔得嘅可以讀埋個 summer。我嘅憂慮係 CC 嗰面會唔會同你講讀三年你就信讀三年，變相佢哋可以讚多你一個學年嘅 fees。我以前 CC 個 counselor 陰9我，我讀 chem/pre-pharm 但係第一個學期無建議我讀 chem 1... 佢仲好好心咁同我講第一個sem唔好讀咁多，廢事你啲分唔得。我聽咗佢嘅意見，然後先發覺我 on9 咗。之後個 summer要take 番幾班去補番，亦因為咁我讀一年半 CC 就 transfer 去 UT-Austin.

申請居留權之前首先要有H-1B工作簽證。以過去數年嘅數據，由於好多印度人申請，年年申請額都爆，所以要電腦抽簽。工種無限制亦無優待，但喺某些非牟利團體做嘢就可以超容易申請H-1B工作簽證。以我自己為例，因為我喺公立學校教書，咁我可以唔使理個 Quota，直接攞簽證。

憑工作簽證申請居留權有幾大類別：
EB-1專才：例如你係啲超勁嘅學者之類嘅人
EB-2 碩士或以上人仕。注： 重點係份工需要你有碩士或以上，而唔係你有無碩士或以上學位。
EB-3 學士或副學士人仕。好似我咁。



你要有工作簽證先可以籍工作簽證申請居留權。工作簽證正常以六年為上限，如果你工作簽證到期時等候政府批核移民文件，你可以續領工作簽證到攞到綠卡為止。

美國居留權同香港唔同，唔係話你喺美國幾多年就有。大方向得兩個： 結婚或者公司幫你搞移民。（小方向當然有政治庇護）我喺美國由做高中學生到番工，足足坐咗15年先搞到張綠卡。

你嘅問題個關鍵其實係你爸爸依家喺芝加哥定係香港？
我啱啱睇咗 University of Illinois System 網頁 (https://www.uaps.uillinois.edu/student_programs/residency_information/residency_status_requirements/)
佢哋列咗好多決定你嘅居民身份嘅 requirements
粗略啲講，如果你老豆有在 Illinois 長期居住、有物業、交州稅、或有投票紀錄嘅話就可以令到你做 Illionis resident。

＝＝＝＝節錄原文＝＝＝＝

A. Continuous physical presence—defined as no more than a three-week absence from the state of Illinois—for at least one calendar year as described above.

B. Domicile in Illinois of parent(s) or guardian legally responsible for the person. Domicile in Illinois of spouse.

C. Voting or registration for voting in Illinois.

D. Illinois driver's license or identification card and automobile registration.

E. Financial independence and payment and filing of Illinois income/property taxes and/or ownership of property in Illinois during the tax year or partial tax year immediately preceding the term for which the person is requesting resident classification. Just the filing of an Illinois state income tax form, or filing a form without substantial Illinois income earned, will not be judged as a significant criterion for reclassification.

F. One calendar year of gainful employment in Illinois or prove reliance upon resources in Illinois for more than fifty percent of the income sufficient to provide for tuition, fees, and normal living expenses, e.g., food, clothing, housing, and transportation. Reliance upon income earned from loans is not viewed as evidence of intent to establish residency. Employment in Illinois must be in other than graduate assistantships or student employment.

G. The lease of living quarters and payment of utility bills in Illinois.

H. Former domicile in the state and maintenance of significant connections therein while absent.

I. Admission to a licensed practicing profession in Illinois.

J. Long-term military commitments in Illinois and/or proof that Illinois is the home of record. The petitioner must complete a Military Certification Form which can be obtained at the Office of Admissions and Records [now called Office of Admissions or Office of the Registrar].

K. A one calendar year period of presence in the state for other than educational purposes.

L. Establishment of financial accounts at Illinois institutions.

M. Public records, for example, birth and marriage records.

N. Other official documents verifying legal, official connection with Illinois or with organizations or institutions within the state of Illinois.

O. Exclusive use of the Illinois address when home or mailing address is requested.

D. Illinois driver's license or identification card and automobile registration.

E. Financial independence and payment and filing of Illinois income/property taxes and/or ownership of property in Illinois during the tax year or partial tax year immediately preceding the term for which the person is requesting resident classification. Just the filing of an Illinois state income tax form, or filing a form without substantial Illinois income earned, will not be judged as a significant criterion for reclassification.

F. One calendar year of gainful employment in Illinois or prove reliance upon resources in Illinois for more than fifty percent of the income sufficient to provide for tuition, fees, and normal living expenses, e.g., food, clothing, housing, and transportation. Reliance upon income earned from loans is not viewed as evidence of intent to establish residency. Employment in Illinois must be in other than graduate assistantships or student employment.

G. The lease of living quarters and payment of utility bills in Illinois.

H. Former domicile in the state and maintenance of significant connections therein while absent.

I. Admission to a licensed practicing profession in Illinois.

J. Long-term military commitments in Illinois and/or proof that Illinois is the home of record. The petitioner must complete a Military Certification Form which can be obtained at the Office of Admissions and Records [now called Office of Admissions or Office of the Registrar].

K. A one calendar year period of presence in the state for other than educational purposes.

L. Establishment of financial accounts at Illinois institutions.

M. Public records, for example, birth and marriage records.

N. Other official documents verifying legal, official connection with Illinois or with organizations or institutions within the state of Illinois.

O. Exclusive use of the Illinois address when home or mailing address is requested.
